name: nCino Bank Operating System API
what_it_does: nCino REST API for cloud-based Bank Operating System built on Salesforce. Enables AI agents to manage commercial loan origination workflow and application data for lending automation, handle credit analysis and financial spreading data for credit decision support, access collateral management and portfolio monitoring data for risk management, retrieve treasury management and deposit account opening workflow data for banking operations, handle regulatory compliance data including CRA, HMDA, and fair lending analytics, access customer and relationship management data for banker productivity, retrieve document management and e-signature integration data for loan closing automation, manage covenant tracking and portfolio review data for commercial banking compliance, handle small business and consumer loan origination workflow for digital lending, and integrate loan origination data with core banking, credit bureaus, and financial services platforms.
use_cases: Automating loan origination from commercial lending agents
Analyzing credit from financial spreading agents
Tracking covenants from portfolio monitoring agents
Managing documents from loan closing agents
not_for: Non-Salesforce environments without Salesforce platform dependency
Consumer FinTech without bank or credit union regulatory context
Simple loan tracking without commercial lending workflow complexity
best_when: A bank, credit union, or financial institution using nCino wants AI agents to automate commercial loan origination, credit analysis, document collection, collateral management, covenant monitoring, and regulatory compliance reporting.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: nCino manages bank regulatory data including CRA, HMDA, and fair lending records — automated loan decisioning based on nCino data without credit officer review creates fair lending and ECOA compliance risk. Automated credit approval without proper credit authority delegation creates unauthorized lending commitments. HMDA loan data accuracy is regulatory obligation; automated HMDA reporting without compliance officer review creates regulatory violations.

auth.notes: nCino uses OAuth 2.0 (leverages Salesforce OAuth as it's built on Salesforce platform). Developer portal at developer.ncino.com. Wilmington, North Carolina HQ. Public (NCNO NASDAQ, IPO 2020). Built entirely on Salesforce platform — requires active Salesforce org. 1,800+ financial institution clients. Strong in commercial banking, community banks, and credit unions. Competes with Finastra, Sagent, and Encompass (ICE Mortgage) for loan origination market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription plus Salesforce platform costs
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by institution size and module; Salesforce license required separately
pricing.notes: Wilmington, North Carolina. Founded 2012. Public (NCNO NASDAQ). 1,800+ financial institution clients. 100% Salesforce-native — requires Salesforce CRM platform. Commercial lending, consumer lending, treasury management modules. Strong in community and regional banks, credit unions. Competes with Finastra's LaserPro, FIS, and Fiserv for bank lending technology.

performance.rate_limits: Inherits Salesforce API limits; nCino-specific limits additional

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Loan approval automation must comply with ECOA and fair lending laws; automated credit decisions without credit officer review and fair lending monitoring creates discriminatory lending risk
Salesforce API limit inheritance — nCino shares Salesforce API limits; high-volume automated queries can exhaust org-level Salesforce limits affecting other banking workflows
Salesforce platform dependency — nCino requires Salesforce; all nCino data lives in Salesforce objects; nCino credentials must also have appropriate Salesforce object permissions
HMDA and CRA data accuracy — nCino generates HMDA and CRA regulatory data; automated loan data must be accurate as HMDA/CRA errors result in regulatory violations and enforcement actions
Credit authority delegation — commercial lending credit approval requires appropriate authority delegation; automated loan approval above credit officer's limit creates unauthorized commitment
Financial spreading accuracy — nCino financial spreading (borrower cash flow analysis) is complex; automated spreading must validate financial statement data against borrower-provided documents
agent_readiness.security_notes: Bank operating system. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP. OAuth2/Salesforce. US/EU/AU. Loan, credit, and banking regulatory data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Bank lending platform. SOC2, FedRAMP. OAuth2/Salesforce. US/EU. Loan and banking regulatory data.
